text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
78 
HCBS_BRN_INJURY_CC_IND 
LABEL: 
HCBS Brain Injury State-Reported Chronic Condition Indicator — Latest in Year 
DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate whether the beneficiary had the Home and Community Based Services (HCBS) Non-
health home Chronic Condition “Brain Injury”; most recent in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: HCBS_BRN_INJURY_CC_IND 
LONG NAME:
